temporal_description:
A man in a white button-down shirt, dark tie, and a lanyard with an ID badge stands in a dimly lit room. He gestures emphatically with his right hand, pointing his finger forward with an intense and angry expression. To his left, an old-style CRT monitor displays a black-and-white security camera feed of a hallway. The time "16:16" is visible on the monitor's screen. In the top left corner of the frame, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera holds a steady medium shot on the man. A man shouts in a loud, aggressive, and high-pitched voice, filled with anger and frustration, "I'll talk to you about business!"

The camera cuts to a close-up of two men sitting at a table. The man in the foreground, on the right, wears a light blue shirt and a striped tie. He looks slightly to his left with a concerned and serious expression, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. To his left, another man in a white uniform shirt and tie looks down with a somber and focused demeanor. The background is a simple office interior. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. Another man responds in a calm, measured, and slightly weary tone, speaking slowly and deliberately as if trying to de-escalate the situation. "No one would have thought it would be like this, okay?" he asks, his voice low and steady.

The camera pulls back to a wide shot of the entire room. The man in the white shirt and tie is now standing at the head of a long, dark table, looking down the length of it. At the table, several other men are seated, some in uniform and some in casual attire. Papers and mugs are scattered on the table. The room appears to be a police station or an interrogation room, with a sterile, institutional feel. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still visible in the top left corner. The shot is static, establishing the group dynamic in the room.
